pages.raw_text:
An important meeting of the ma.
tional apple show trustees and rep
resentatives of the various rail-
roads was held at the chamber of
commerce this morning and ar
rangements begun for the exhibit
ton of the entire prize winning ex-
hibit at Chicago next December in
connection with the United States
reclamation exposition. The rail
road men are anxious to show the
prize winning apples in the east,
but the question of securing
enough space is serious obstacle.
1t will require 10000 square feet
for this part of the apple exhibit,
about one third of the total ex-
hihit.


The matter of securing the Col
esium for the exhibit was taken up
by telegraph, and further arrange
ments await the answer. Another
meeting will be held late this aft
ernoon to consider apple show
rats. The roads offer one and
one third fare, the same as last
year, from Chicago and common
points.


Secretary Rice has received no
tice that the Great Northern will
contribute $500 to irrigation con-
gress and apple show expense.
This is indicative that the other
roads running in here will contrib
ute in proportion. in which case
the matter of raising sufficient
fund to take care of the summer
attractions will be settled.
